labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 561612 ($31,693,782,072) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 561612 ($37,274,030,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

occupations.title: Sales Representatives of Services, Except Advertising, Insurance, Financial Services, and Travel
Dispatchers, Except Police, Fire, and Ambulance
Secretaries and Administrative Assistants, Except Legal, Medical, and Executive
